name: Skill

name.description: The skill name (no arguments). E.g., "pdf" or "xlsx"

description: Execute a skill within the main conversation. Skills provide specialized capabilities and domain knowledge. When a skill is relevant, it should be invoked IMMEDIATELY as the first action.
description_zh: 在主对话中执行技能。技能提供专门的功能和领域知识。当技能相关时，应立即作为第一个操作调用。
